name: BAR HARBOR BANKSHARES
business: Bar Harbor Bankshares is a bank holding company that provides banking and financial services through its subsidiary Bar Harbor Bank & Trust, serving individuals, businesses, and institutions in Maine, New Hampshire, and Vermont. The company offers a variety of financial products and services including loans, deposits, trust services, wealth management, and other financial services. Its primary sources of revenue are net interest income from loans and investments and noninterest income from fees and other financial services.

exposures.sentence: We employ an in-depth, layered, defense approach that leverages people, processes and technology to manage and maintain cybersecurity controls.

We offer our customers the ability to bank remotely and provide other technology-based products and services, which services include the secure transmission of confidential information over the internet and other remote channels.

The financial services industry undergoes rapid technological changes with frequent introductions of new technology-driven products and services, including developments in artificial intelligence and machine learning.
As of December 31, 2025, approximately 66% of our loan portfolio consisted of commercial real estate, commercial and industrial and construction loans.
